name: chr19_19q13_42_NKG2_LRC_xref
description: Cross-reference: 19q13.42 leukocyte-receptor complex (LRC) extended view. The LRC spans the KIR cluster (../kir/KIR_locus_chr19.json), the LILR/LAIR cluster (chr19_19p13_3_LILR_LAIR_xref.json), and the NKG2/CD94 sub-cluster nearby. This file collects the SD-relevant pointers in one place.

architecture.internal_structure: Composite leukocyte-receptor complex: LILR/LAIR proximal cluster, NKG2 / CD94 lectin-like receptors, then KIR distal cluster. Many SDs at 90-99% identity; haplotype diversity drives both gene-content and copy-number variation.
